message.thinking:
We need to evaluate the given text for each of the three questions.

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text includes a table of activities but not explicit chapters. It includes introduction section but not chapters list. So answer: No, it doesn't list main sections. Provide feedback.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text is mostly introduction, no description of each section. So no.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, because only introduction and table of activities. So no.

Thus all three are false. Provide feedback.

Return JSON array with three objects. Each object has "question" field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback. Complies false.
